mapper.update: /* TM_CL22002_Dao_saveRecExcclcNotSnpwList */ MERGE INTO tm_cl22002 A USING ( SELECT #{recDelngYear} AS rec_delng_year, LPAD(#{recDelngMt}, 2, '0') AS rec_delng_mt, #{recEqpCdNm} AS rec_eqp_cd_nm, #{recExcclcQy} AS rec_excclc_qy, #{recExcclcUpc} AS rec_excclc_upc, #{recExcclcTamt} AS rec_excclc_tamt, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.rec_delng_year = B.rec_delng_year AND A.rec_delng_mt = B.rec_delng_mt AND A.rec_eqp_cd_nm = B.rec_eqp_cd_nm ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.rec_excclc_qy = B.rec_excclc_qy, A.rec_excclc_upc = B.rec_excclc_upc, A.rec_excclc_tamt = B.rec_excclc_tamt, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.rec_delng_year, A.rec_delng_mt, A.rec_eqp_cd_nm, A.rec_excclc_qy, A.rec_excclc_upc, A.rec_excclc_tamt, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn ) VALUES ( B.rec_delng_year, B.rec_delng_mt, B.rec_eqp_cd_nm, B.rec_excclc_qy, B.rec_excclc_upc, B.rec_excclc_tamt, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn )
